data.current_description: Returns country-level geolocation data for the specified IP address.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve country-level geolocation for IP address
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves country-level geolocation data for a specified IP address. Accepts an IP address as input (IPv4 or IPv6) and returns country information including country code, name, and continent details. Requires HTTP Basic Authentication with MaxMind account credentials.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't indicate the action clearly. Description lacks input parameter details (IP format), output schema information (what country fields are returned), and authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies IP format support, authentication method, and expected response structure for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns city-level geolocation data for the specified IP address, including postal code, coordinates, and accuracy radius.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves city-level geolocation data for a specified IP address. Accepts an IP address as input (IPv4 or IPv6) and returns detailed location information including city, postal code, latitude/longitude coordinates, accuracy radius, and timezone. Requires HTTP Basic Authentication with MaxMind account credentials.

data.current_description: Returns the most detailed geolocation data available, including ISP, organization, domain, and risk scoring for the specified IP address.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the most comprehensive geolocation and IP intelligence data available for a specified IP address.
